text: caucasian engineer wearing a traditional rice farmer hat, his eyes flickering with lightning power,
ludwig a fluffy black cat with no ears and no tail, forever on the hunt for more asbestos,
grey tabby cat and asbestos taco stand partner
capybara in a black beanie that reads "Giant" in red letters,
farmer hedgehog elbow-deep in a broken tractor engine,
quail wife to the farmer hedgehog,
